message:
fix(q): propagate id_exists errors instead of swallowing them

- Replace .unwrap_or(false) with ? on id_exists() calls in parent
  child ID generation — DB errors now propagate instead of silently
  treating IDs as non-existent
- Use saturating_add(100) for collision loop bound to prevent
  theoretical u32 overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
